summary: PR 2595 links src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c by changing its configure.py object status from NonMatching to Matching, cleaning source-level data declarations, and updating GALE01 split/symbol metadata for ftdevice data, bss, sdata, and sbss exposure.

key_files.role: Changed melee/ft/ftdevice.c from NonMatching to Matching in the MatchingFor object list.
Removed force_active and literal extern declarations; changed ft_804D6570 from static file-local to exported int definition.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c hunk near includes and globals
raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.h hunk near ftdevice globals

key_files.role: Updated ftdevice-related string symbols from global names to local labels; consolidated bss metadata at 0x80459A68; changed one sdata string from global ftCo_804D3C18 to local @251.
Narrowed ftdevice bss split range from 0x80459A68-0x8045A6C0 to 0x80459A68-0x80459A98.

what_changed: Marked Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ftdevice.c") in configure.py where it was previously NonMatching.
Removed five literal extern declarations from ftdevice.c: ftDevice_803C6B18, ftDevice_803C6B40, ftDevice_803C6B4C, ftDevice_803C6B78, and ftCo_804D3C18.
Changed ft_804D6570 from a static int definition in ftdevice.c to a non-static int definition and added its extern declaration to ftdevice.h.
Changed several ftdevice string symbols in symbols.txt from global address-style names to local @ labels.
Changed bss metadata so ft_80459A68 is size 0x30 with a local ...bss.0 label, replacing separate symbol entries for ft_80459A68, ftDevice_BuryThings, and ft_80459A8C in that metadata hunk.
Changed the ftdevice bss split end from 0x8045A6C0 to 0x80459A98.

smart_moves.text: The PR removed source-level literal externs and represented the corresponding strings as local labels in symbols.txt, reducing fake or convenience global declarations in the C source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt .data and .sdata string label changes

smart_moves.text: The PR paired Matching status with split and symbol metadata updates, rather than only flipping configure.py.
The PR exposed ft_804D6570 through ftdevice.h after making the definition non-static, keeping the header consistent with the recovered linkage surface.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking a TU, source cleanup may require moving generated-looking literal externs out of C and into symbol metadata as local labels when the diff evidence supports local string ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c removed literal extern declarations
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt converted ftDevice_803C6B18/40/4C/78 and ftCo_804D3C18 to local labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: A Matching status flip can be coupled with split-range correction and bss symbol consolidation when the object's data ownership boundaries are clarified.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/splits.txt bss end narrowed to 0x80459A98
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt bss symbols consolidated at 0x80459A68

naming_conventions.convention: String symbols without supported global identity were represented as local @ labels rather than address-style ftDevice_/ftCo_ global names in this PR.
The existing address-style name ft_804D6570 was kept when exporting the int through the header; the PR did not invent a semantic name.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove #pragma force_active once string/data symbol metadata no longer requires forcing source-local literal externs active.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c removed literal extern declarations
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt string symbols changed to local labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use split metadata and symbols.txt together to define the TU's data/bss ownership while linking a previously NonMatching object.

follow_up_queries: ftdevice force_active literal extern symbols.txt local labels

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/state/author/timestamps and changed file counts
metadata_json: zero review comments and zero issue comments
notes: The diff is complete and directly supports changed files and concrete edits.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Linking ftdevice paired Matching status with metadata cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2595 changed ftdevice.c to Matching and updated symbols/splits metadata, including local string labels and a narrowed bss range. Treat as PR-specific evidence that linking a TU can require symbol ownership cleanup, not only source body edits.

source_update_candidates.title: ftdevice.c marked Matching in PR 2595
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2595 changed configure.py from Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ftdevice.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ftdevice.c").
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete path/status fact from the PR diff, suitable for curator review before any source-corpus update.

source_update_candidates.title: ftdevice bss split narrowed in PR 2595
source_update_candidates.text: For melee/ft/ftdevice.c, config/GALE01/splits.txt changed the .bss range from start 0x80459A68 end 0x8045A6C0 to start 0x80459A68 end 0x80459A98.
source_update_candidates.reason: Concrete split metadata change should be routed through source/path-fact curation rather than treated as a global lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer symbol metadata cleanup over source literal externs when linking TUs
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate standard: when a TU links, review whether literal extern declarations and force_active pragmas are only compensating for string/data metadata. If symbol ownership supports local labels, remove generated-looking literal externs from C and represent the data in symbols.txt. PR 2595 is supporting evidence, not sufficient by itself for a global rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c removed force_active and literal externs
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt converted string globals to local labels
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR aligns with existing standards on data ownership and avoiding artificial source constructs, but one PR with no rationale is not enough to promote directly.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all ftDevice_* or ftCo_* address-style string globals should become local labels; this PR only shows specific symbols at 0x803C6B18, 0x803C6B40, 0x803C6B4C, 0x803C6B78, and 0x804D3C18.
Do not claim objdiff/checkdiff/build validation from the loaded evidence; no such output is present.
Do not infer reviewer intent or requested changes; there were no loaded review comments.
Do not generalize that #pragma force_active is always removable; this PR only shows its removal in ftdevice alongside matching and symbol metadata changes.
